sources.title: Zero Gravity - Drive Survival (SCIENCE FICTION Film in German, Whole survival films German)

metadata.Plot: Zero Gravity follows a diverse group of middle-school students from San Jose, CA, who compete in a nationwide tournament to code satellites aboard the International Space Station. Seen through the wondrous eyes of three young students and their first-time coach, they each take an intimate and personal journey to space as their team grows from amateur coders to representing California in the ISS Finals Tournament -- the culmination of a summer-long adventure that sees their incredible accomplishment performed by astronauts in orbit.
metadata.Actors: Cady Coleman, Adrien Engelder, Jack Fischer
